creator: jamie@catflap.org
text:
(In reply to Dag-Erling Smørgrav from comment #6)

Fair enough. Obviously, even in my use case, there could be a potential race condition, so I suppose its use as an existence test can only be considered to give historical information.

Might it be an idea when you remove that line to suggest in its place what would be the best alternative to use? I think some people will be more likely to follow the security advice if they are given an alternative!
